nasb.text: He reigned three years in Jerusalem; and his mother’s name was Micaiah the daughter of Uriel of Gibeah. Now there was war between Abijah and Jeroboam.

esv.text: He reigned for three years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Micaiah the daughter of Uriel of Gibeah. Now there was war between Abijah and Jeroboam.

cnv.text: 他在耶路撒冷作王三年；他母親名叫米該亞，是基比亞人烏列的女兒。亞比雅和耶羅波安常有爭戰。

ccb.text: 在耶路撒冷执政三年。他母亲叫米该亚，是基比亚人乌列的女儿。亚比雅和耶罗波安之间常有争战。
